programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: Six players compete in the prestigious WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic at Bellagio for the more than $800,000 first-place prize.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic Part 3
programme.desc: Three players compete in the prestigious WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic at Bellagio for the more than $800,000 first-place prize.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Venice Grand Prix
programme.desc: Six players compete in the storied city of Venice, Italy for more than $300,000 in the WPT Venice Grand Prix.

programme.title: The Bikini Carwash Company 2
programme.desc: The girls from The Bikini Carwash Company, (1992) are back. Their carwash company is a success, but to prevent it from being consumed by a mega company, the ladies partner up with a TV lingerie business.

programme.title: Christiane F.
programme.desc: A teen girl in 1970's Berlin becomes addicted to heroin. Everything in her life slowly begins to distort and disappear as she befriends a small crew of junkies and falls in love with a drug-abusing male prostitute.

programme.title: Orgy of the Dead
programme.desc: A couple driving to a cemetery looking for inspiration for a horror story encounters the dancing dead.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: French is a martial artist that takes on a job as a mob debt collector in order to make ends meet. He does whatever it takes to chase down individuals until he meets a bartender that makes him question whether he should do the right thing.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: Craig Fairbrass stars as Lex, who has been told that his daughter has died in LA. However, he finds that the body isn't his daughter, and that an internet fraudster has her hostage. Lex wreaks havoc through the streets of LA trying to find her.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: A jilted fan soon finds himself pulled into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse after he accepts the opportunity to spy on his favorite actress via his laptop.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards including BEST PICTURE, A car accident brings together a group of strangers in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: The Encounter
programme.desc: When Collin is discovered naked, disoriented and alone in the forest, he struggles to recount the events of the previous night. His memories return in a series of horrific flashes of what became of his friends and fiancée.

programme.title: Amanda and the Alien
programme.desc: A young Bohemian female artist falls in love with a hot human-eating alien and teaches him how to be more human. However, the police his on his trail.

programme.title: LX 2048
programme.desc: In the near future, the sun has become so toxic people can no longer leave their houses in daytime, and normal life is conducted mostly inside the virtual realm.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo River
programme.desc: We make the epic journey from Kinshasha, capital of the DRC, to Kisangani, the third largest city in this vast country. The only way to move between the cities is by boat or plane. We join 1,500 people onboard the 'Gbemani'.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Argentina
programme.desc: A dairy farmer drives his Mad Max style lorry - half bus, half tractor - through swamped lagoons to deliver his farm's milk.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Benin
programme.desc: Travellers make a white knuckle journey to cross \\"The River Of Death\\".

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to buyers there but are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning. Tempers flare when they try to get the plane off the ship and delivered to its final destination

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey. Christine pushes to become a DC-3 co-pilot,

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago. It's a personal quest for Joe; he flew that plane at the beginning of his career.

programme.title: We Are the Flesh
programme.desc: After wandering a ruined city for years in search of food and shelter, two siblings find their way into one of the last remaining buildings. Inside, they find a man who will make them a dangerous offer to survive the outside world.

programme.title: Behind You
programme.desc: Two young sisters find that all the mirrors in her house are covered or hidden. When one of the sisters happens upon a mirror in the basement, she unknowingly releases a malicious demon that had haunted her mother and aunt years ago.

programme.title: The Devil Below
programme.desc: A group of four amateur adventurers who specialize in exploring remote and forsaken places pay a visit to Shookum Hills, a town in the remote Appalachian Mountains, which was abandoned decades ago due to a mysterious coal mine fire.

programme.title: You Can’t Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory

programme.title: The Search for Secret Santa
programme.desc: A reporter tries to uncover and bring closure to a long-lost, undelivered gift before Christmas.

programme.title: Unforgettable Belgium in Russia 2018™
programme.desc: Relive Belgium's victories against Japan and Brazil in the 2018 FIFA World Cup™.

programme.title: FIFA U-17 World Cup
programme.desc: From Sausalito Stadium in Vina del Mar, Valparaiso, Chile.

programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: While trying to convince a disgraced ex-cop (Sam Worthington) to come in from a high-rise ledge, a police negotiator (Elizabeth Banks) begins to realize that the man has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A vacation in Spain turns nightmarish when a man's (Henry Cavill) family is kidnapped by agents who are hell-bent on recovering a mysterious briefcase.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: York: Dan explores the history of York's castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, to the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Exploring Arundel Castle and the history of the Earls of Arundel; how knights would have fought in the Hundred Years' War; how Arundel Castle would have prepared for Queen Victoria's visit in 1846.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Leeds: Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of the beautiful Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon family's manor to a 20th-century retreat for the rich.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.title: Violence in a Women’s Prison
programme.desc: Undercover reporter Emanuelle poses as a prostitute in order to expose a prison’s human rights violations. She’s shocked at the brutal treatment of inmates, but things get worse when the prison warden discovers Emanuelle’s true identity.

programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Rebel
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Evil Intentions
programme.desc: Visit a haunted tattoo shop and witness a supernatural family reunion.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing In Evil

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Kids Under Attack
programme.desc: Watch a boy encounter a terrifying being, and an imaginary friend turns evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11

programme.desc: When Faye and Marian Caliman first met, she was bowled over by his gentlemanly ways. He was the life and soul of family parties. But when the marriage turned sour, Faye and her family realised Marian was not the true gent he’d always pretended.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Andrew and Janee Parsons’ marriage broke down when she fell for someone new. Still living in the family home, Janee hadn’t reckoned on Andrew’s jealousy and violence - just as he hadn’t realised his horrific actions would all be caught on tape.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Scott Gellatly swept neighbour Lori Jackson off her feet. But her mother Merry had doubts about Scott. He controlled where Lori went, and who she spoke to. So when things turned violent, it wasn’t just Lori in the firing line.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Rhys Hancock was a respected school head; his wife Helen a much-loved PE teacher. When their marriage failed she found love with Martin Griffiths. But Rhys made the choice that ending his wife’s happiness would be worth the long prison sentence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 5: Space Missions
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Jungle Planet

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Swift is facing a childcare crisis after having kicked out her nannies and Belphagor chooses between family and friend.

programme.title: Wildest Islands

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: History repeats itself with terrifying consequences for Swift while Flint faces the Ubuntu gang and her first real test.

programme.title: Wildest Europe

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Arthur: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List
programme.desc: Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer
programme.desc: One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose
programme.desc: When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Almost Boring Day/The Half-Baked Sale
programme.desc: It's raining and boy is it BORING! But then, in Grandma Thora's attic, Arthur and D.W. discover some really FASCINATING stuff about their parents. Next, Grandma Thora is helping to organize a bake sale, but her goodies aren’t very good.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur: The World Record/The Cave
programme.desc: Why is Buster walking backwards and Muffy not talking? They're trying to set world records of course! Then, Arthur thinks his class trip to the Clark Caves will be really cool--but won't it be dark in there?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Rides The Bandwagon/Dad's Dessert Dilemma
programme.desc: Woogles have their own names and personalities and they're so darned cute! And Arthur's gotta have one, especially now that everyone is collecting them. Arthur wouldn't mind if Dad's infamous dessert "experiments" remained a family secret.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball
programme.desc: For her sleepover with Marina, Prunella redecorates her room. But Marina is blind--will the decorations she can't see offend her, or worse, make her trip? D.W. has been trying to solve the mystery of her snowball's disappearance.

programme.title: World War II in HD Color
programme.desc: Country after European country falls before the unstoppable German blitzkrieg.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: War Story: Sicily: The First Campaign
programme.desc: The Sicily Campaign began with the largest seaborne invasion in history on 9-10 July 1943. The Allied forces of Britain, Canada, and the United States sought to knock Italy out of the war and attack Germany from the south.

programme.title: War Story: Ortona: The War Inside
programme.desc: The War Inside is a personal retelling of one of the fiercest battles of the Italian Campaign from the searing points of view of Canadian infantrymen, a tanker, a stretcher bearer, and a German paratrooper.

programme.title: War Story: The Road to Rome
programme.desc: The Road to Rome examines the incredible experiences of Canadian veterans, the victories and horrors of armoured combat, and the pivotal value, far too often neglected, of the overall Italian Campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Out of the Clouds: Paras in Normandy
programme.desc: In Normandy, the 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion proved itself to be in the vanguard of the best-trained and toughest units in the Allied forces.

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Bomb: Episode 2
programme.desc: Did Nazi uranium make it to Japan in the final months of WW2? Were the Axis powers closer to a bomb than we think? Drama unfolds as experts shed new light on the hardships, challenges and secrets of a war-torn, pre-nuclear world.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B17: The mighty Flying Fortress takes to the air as we examine the background and development of one of WWII's most iconic bombers.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In Stealth we examine the methods ships have used to evade detection. With the advent of radar in WW2, ships that wanted to remain undetected had to find ways to hide.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: A feuding Dan and Mia are forced to partner up when V adds an unexpected twist to his tournament's semi-final round.

programme.title: Bakugan

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: V's partner is revealed, and they face off against Mia and Ventri in a high-stakes brawl.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Griffin and Juno visit V's MOD to figure out how he's able to convince Bakugan to join his side.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Alice becomes Masked Man to aid Dan and Drago, but they find Centorrior and Druman unexpectedly powerful. Undeterred, Dan and Masked Man formulate a strategy to overcome their foes.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: The Brawlers fail to reach Vestroia in time, allowing Naga to invade Earth with his destructive Bakugan army. To thwart him, they must locate Wavern, the keeper of the Infinity Core.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Naga and his followers sow panic worldwide, but the Brawlers return. Wavern creates a force field around them using the Infinity Core, yet it collapses due to the core's intense heat.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: The Brawlers divide to defend separate areas of the neighbourhood. Billy and Cycloid arrive to assist Julie and Gorem. Julie warns that Tricloid's arrival will bring Naga's malevolent influence.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Rabeeder hunts for the Infinity Core to deliver to Naga, but Alice and Christopher confront her. Meanwhile, Wavern urges Drago to take the Infinity Core before Naga can steal it.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Hairadee arrives seeking vengeance against Skyress, sparking a fierce battle. Shun and Komba are transported to a desolate castle, preventing their interference, whilst Harpus is destroyed.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: The situation looks grim for Wavern and the Infinity Core. They have taken refuge atop Wardington Tower, but Naga and his forces are closing in.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Naga traps Wavern, seemingly forcing her to surrender the Infinity Core to her evil brother. However, Dan and Drago arrive just in time.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: As Drago nears defeat and evil seems set to triumph, the Brawlers arrive with their Bakugan. Uniting their forces, they successfully protect the Infinity Core.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The connection between Earth and Vestroia is becoming weaker and weaker. When Dan and Athena learn of this, they take the initiative. A journey to Auropolis is their last hope for a possible rescue and reversal of the situation.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and Athena discover that the Swarm have been absorbing vast amounts of Earth's energy, and it turns out that Magnus has been leading the Awesome Brawlers to help defend the planet.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers have an uphill battle ahead of them. They battle against an ultra-powerful Bakugan villain, Hanoj, whose only objective is to devour all of Earth and Vestroia's energy.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: As the Awesome Brawlers train for the Battle Judgement, they learn of a new Core called the 'Nova Core'. Dan and Drago use its mysterious new powers against an unexpected opponent.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers split up as they attempt to master the new Nova technique. Lia does her best to protect a couple of children from a local bully.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers continue to look to their individual skill sets and experiences to help them master the Nova technique. Meanwhile, Athena faces an old foe at the Bakugan Academy.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and his friends have to compete with their Bakugan against the ultimate villain, Hanoj. To do this, they use the new Nova technology. However, Dan continues to struggle with his mastery of the new tech.

programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels

programme.desc: Six players compete in the storied city of Venice, Italy for more than $300,000 in the WPT Venice Grand Prix.

programme.title: Orgy of the Dead
programme.desc: A couple driving to a cemetery looking for inspiration for a horror story encounters the dancing dead.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: A Night In Casablanca
programme.desc: The Marx Brothers are employed at a hotel in post-war Casablanca, where a ring of Nazis are trying to recover a cache of stolen treasure. (1946) Starring: Groucho Marx, Harpo Marx, Chico Marx

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his experiments by using parts of dead bodies.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: Craig Fairbrass stars as Lex, who has been told that his daughter has died in LA. However, he finds that the body isn't his daughter, and that an internet fraudster has her hostage. Lex wreaks havoc through the streets of LA trying to find her.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Smokey Bites The Dust
programme.desc: This movie follows the rivalry between a small-town southern sheriff and a small-town teenaged thief who steals cars and destroys them with the sheriff's daughter by his side.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards including BEST PICTURE, A car accident brings together a group of strangers in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Grandma Dearest
programme.desc: A psychotic woman goes to murderous lengths to protect her relationship with her new grandchildren.

programme.title: LX 2048
programme.desc: In the near future, the sun has become so toxic people can no longer leave their houses in daytime, and normal life is conducted mostly inside the virtual realm.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago. It's a personal quest for Joe; he flew that plane at the beginning of his career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Turkey or Bust

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cliffside Castle
programme.desc: Beat takes on one of the most perilous builds of his career, a luxury twin-turreted vacation home on the edge of 100-foot cliff.

programme.title: Timber Kings: It’s a Dirty Job
programme.desc: A reluctant Joel joins forces with his wife to construct a backyard obstacle course that he hopes will prepare them for one Tough Mudder of a race.

programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of the fire-bombing of an abortion clinic places them on opposing sides over this controversial issue. When a patient is killed in the blast, they must decide if it was one murder or two.

programme.desc: The detective must crack a mother's testimony on the alibi of her son who is accused of robbery and assault while Lacey (Tyne Daly) must deal with her own son's problems at school. Also starring Sharon Gless as Christine Cagney.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.desc: While directing the anti-terrorist unit at 36 Quai des Orfèvres, Commissioner De Hauteclocque finds himself faced with a case that is making headlines.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Mystery of Disembodied Feet

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Vowes
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce  with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Florida

programme.title: A Haunting: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Meriden, Connecticut natives Lynn and Jason Ryder purchase a historic restaurant, thinking it will be an adventure to operate an establishment so much a part of their youth. Little do they know their experience is about to turn into their worst nightmare.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.desc: Bill Taylor loved wife Angela, even when she left him, even when she met new partner, Paul Cannon. But Angela hated Bill, because he refused to divorce her. The answer, in Angela and Paul’s minds, was to end the marriage by any means necessary.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Greg Williams was Michelle’s knight in shining armour. A mother of three, working in the sex industry, Greg was her ticket to a luxurious life. When an intruder breached their mansion’s security and attacked the couple, detectives were baffled.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Maria Sanutti-Spencer revelled in her dad Rocco’s criminal past, and threatened violent retribution for anyone who crossed her. As her marriage broke down, her husband, Frank, saw first-hand what Maria and her father were capable of.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Claire and Andrew Tavener were a sociable couple. But when Andrew drank, he became paranoid and possessive. So when he threatened to kill his 'cheating' wife, his friends wrote it off as the rambling of a drunk.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Island of the Devil
programme.desc: Just 460,000 people live in Tasmania, an island off the southeast coast of mainland Australia. While its human population is small, the majestic state is rich in natural wonders and is known for its large tracts of pristine wilderness.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: One of the strangest ecosystems on the planet is the Spiny Forest of Madagascar where almost all the plants are armed with thorns like daggers.

programme.title: Wild Asia: Monsoon
programme.desc: A visually stunning and dramatic portrait of India’s mighty monsoon as it brings life — and death — to a thirsting land.

programme.title: Wild Spain: The Mediterranean South
programme.desc: Even in the southern Spain, highly popular with holidaymakers, there is much waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem - Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Run Fugitive, Run
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Vegas or Bust
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket - Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Playing Possum
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Banker and The Bum
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Brightest Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.desc: There are those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe. Discover the new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball
programme.desc: For her sleepover with Marina, Prunella redecorates her room. But Marina is blind--will the decorations she can't see offend her, or worse, make her trip? D.W. has been trying to solve the mystery of her snowball's disappearance.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and D.W. Clean Up/The Long, Dull Winter
programme.desc: Arthur just might make it to Happy Crazy Wow Day at the park--if he and D.W. can work together to clean their rooms! Then, Arthur and the gang realize they are suffering from the January doldrums brought on by an acute lack of holidays.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Unravels/All the Rage
programme.desc: Grandma Thora teaches Arthur to knit and he's really into this new hobby. But…he's a kid! And a boy! Knitting is a grandma thing, right? And, Muffy wants to rock the fashion world, but creating a fad is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Classy Classics Club/Best Enemies
programme.desc: Muffy buys all of the books and dolls in the Pretty Pioneers series and invites her friends to join a pretty book club. Mom has new clients coming over and they have a daughter who is D.W.'s age. They're going to be the best of friends!

programme.title: Arthur: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse
programme.desc: Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II
programme.desc: Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: So Long, Spanky/Buster's New Friend
programme.desc: D.W.'s beloved bird gets very sick, and despite D.W.'s eager ministrations, Spanky dies. Can she risk giving her heart to another pet? Then, Buster doesn't have time for Arthur. And all he wants to talk about is a new friend named Mike.

programme.title: Arthur: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II
programme.desc: Buster's going to New York City to meet his dad Bo, and the Reads are coming with him! He's thrilled ... but won't his mom miss him? But, Bitzi gives him a present that will let him share his exciting trip with her--a video camera!

programme.title: War Story: Across the Rhine: Paras in Germany
programme.desc: In mid-September 1944, the remnants of the battered 1st Canadian Parachute Battalion participated in the largest parachute drop in history, fought a successful battle.

programme.title: War Story: Vengeance
programme.desc: In 1941, nearly 30,000 Jews escaped the ghettos and work camps and they joined the growing underground resistance army, actively fighting the Nazis.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury
programme.desc: At Stalingrad, the German 6th Army is destroyed by the Soviets. It’s the first major defeat of the Third Reich, which marks the beginning of its decline. Elsewhere, after the American victory at Guadalcanal, Japan loses the initiative in the Pacific.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Hitler's last secret is revealed: a sprawling underground headquarters at Książ Castle, complete with a spectacular network of underground complexes in the Owl Mountains. Was this intended to be the birthplace of Hitler’s ultimate superweapon?

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians of the Thai-Burma railway tell the story of its construction. Built to supply Japan’s invasion of India, it cost thousands of lives – both POWs and Asian slave labourers.

programme.title: Auschwitz Countdown To Liberation
programme.desc: An exceptional documentary that chronicles the liberation of Auschwitz, commencing on the day of liberation and backtracking in time to narrate the tragedy of the Holocaust.

programme.desc: Only experimental spinal surgery can save sniper victim Brown from paralysis; guests Vic Morrow, E.G. Marshall.

programme.desc: A TV talk-show host (James Gregory) cooperates in a plan to flush out a girl's murderer.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer
programme.desc: Two girls are attacked by a man armed with a baseball bat. One of them manages to escape but the second one is found in a salmon river. The killer nags the police for months until he leaves behind a telling clue.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Changes started subtly for twins Addi and Cassi, but after medical testing it was discovered they had a strange, genetic disease that causes progressive neurological deterioration.

programme.desc: A businesswoman is in a whirlwind romance, but her newfound joy is cut short when her family finds her murdered; a bizarre confession reveals a deluded mind behind her death; in Northampton, England, a man with multiple stab wounds is discovered.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: In Florida, USA, a woman goes missing with a large sum of money; assuming foul play, the police are running out of time to find her, until someone is caught lying on camera; in the UK, the shocking murder of a woman in her own home sparks outrage.

programme.desc: A young mother is found unresponsive in bed, and her cause of death is determined to be an accidental heroin overdose, but her family has more questions than answers and launches their own investigation.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rusty Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie's Number Two
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: From Duck 'til Dawn
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Burger Commander
programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: G.I. Si
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old G.I. Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jase and the Argonauts
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Playhouse
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalogue, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep themselves. But the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Big LeCOWski
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 1

programme.desc: Is biological life merely a stepping stone for a universe dominated by alien artificial intelligence?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.desc: Since Leuh saw surfer Justin it's been insta-love. But after two failed attempts to meet up, she wants to know if he's the man of her dreams or is she one in a long line of online lovers. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brendan loves McKenna, but failed attempts to connect have left him wondering if McKenna is for real. Nev teams with social media sensation Karrueche Tran to help Brendan uncover the truth. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jaylin is prepared to sacrifice a lifelong friendship and promising videogame career to be with a woman he's never even spoken to on the phone. (S5, ep5)

programme.desc: Maci and Kyle contemplate buying a house, Farrah introduces Sophia to her new boyfriend and Amber struggles to find a way to see her daughter. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 1969 Morris Mini Cooper MkII is totally restored by motor specialists. They give it the full works, which means only one thing. Any chance of profit heads towards an open window.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as crews attend a cycling accident and a man having a suspected stroke. Plus, the paramedics assist a woman who has fallen and a baby with multiple seizures.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics cope with a reported stabbing and help a man who was run over by his own car. They also visit a woman suffering from a panic attack and attend a man in agony from a dislocated hip.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.desc: Samonia wants to mend her friendship with Leslie after criticizing her partners. Meanwhile, Kalondra left her husband Anthony due to lies, but he's trying to win her back. Karamo helps by unlocking both their phones to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1938, Nazi Germany annexed Austria. Hitler seized the Spear of Destiny, a Roman spearhead believed to hold power from Christ's crucifixion. He paraded it in Nuremberg to assert authority, but by 1945, amid Germany's ruin, the spear had vanished.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre

programme.title: Arthur: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II

programme.title: Arthur: To Tibble the Truth/Waiting to Go
programme.desc: When the Tibble Twins' constant lying lands them in constant trouble, they promise to tell only the truth. Binky and Brain collide on the soccer field, breaking Brain's new watch and nearly breaking their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., Queen of the Comeback/In My Africa
programme.desc: The Tibbles tease, D.W. fires back, the Tibbles taunt, D.W. has a snappy comeback, and round and round they go! Will it ever end? Then, D.W.'s new classmate, Cheikh, is Brain's young cousin…and is also from Senegal, Africa!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.

programme.title: Arthur: Rhyme For Your Life/For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: While struggling to write a poem for his mom, Binky falls asleep and gets trapped in Verseberg--where it's a crime not to rhyme! And D.W. has lost her voice! For Arthur it's a dream come true--until Mom asks Arthur to take care of D.W.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous
programme.desc: Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!

programme.title: Arthur: Popular Girls/Buster's Growing Grudge
programme.desc: Sue Ellen and Fern take a popularity quiz in a magazine and change their personalities to become more likable, but it backfires. And Buster's convinced that his great joke will be the difference between a successful oral report and failure.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva
programme.desc: The protracted romance between Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun began in 1929 and ended in 1945 in the bunker under the ruins of the Chancellery.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: Auschwitz Countdown To Liberation
programme.desc: An exceptional documentary that chronicles the liberation of Auschwitz, commencing on the day of liberation and backtracking in time to narrate the tragedy of the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Nazi scientists conducted brutal experiments for an Aryan master race, while zoologists ran their own bizarre trials.

programme.title: Greatest Escapes of WWII
programme.desc: Colditz Castle, the foreboding Nazi fortress that became a university of escapology; The Great Escape, and the doomed airmen of Stalag Luft Three; and the most daring breakout of them all, the ‘Warburg Wire Job’.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: ME-109: The Luftwaffe’s Frontline Fighter
programme.desc: The definitive, if not the best, Axis fighter of World War two: we delve into the story of legendary ace Adolf Galland and examine in detail and example of the type in his colours. We also look at the technical heritage the 109 designers left.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: F4: Explore classic and underrated aircraft, from WWII fighters to the Screaming Eagles F4, showcasing aviation's evolving history.

programme.desc: A couple leaves Wales to try their luck running a bar in southern Spain, a couple of newlyweds swap Jersey for France, and two British hoteliers from Norfolk hand their livelihood over to their best friends as they take a well-deserved holiday.

programme.desc: Jet wakes up one day to find an oversized egg in his bed and is convinced he laid it while he was sleeping. The Dinos try to convince him that this is not only impossible, but just plain weird.
